description: Create a 'straight-ahead' animation of a growing shape (such as a circle, blob, or vine) in OpenToonz. The animation must start small on Frame 1 and grow progressively larger over at least 12 frames, with a unique, hand-drawn shape for each frame rather than a scaled drawing. Render the final animation as a PNG sequence with a transparent background to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/growth_anim/.
